originalTitle: Burkina Faso must 'forget' about democracy, military leader says
title: Burkina Faso must 'forget' about democracy, military leader says
content: Capt Ibrahim Traoré, who seized power in 2023, says democratic rule would not work for his country.

originalTitle: Four toddlers stabbed to death at Ugandan nursery school
title: Four toddlers stabbed to death at Ugandan nursery school
content: The suspect is in custody but his motive is unknown, the police say in a brief statement.

originalTitle: Sixteen Kenyans missing in Russia after army recruitment
title: Sixteen Kenyans missing in Russia after army recruitment
content: More than 250 Kenyans have gone to fight for Russia in Ukraine, mostly willingly, Kenya's foreign minister says.

originalTitle: Gattuso out as Italy’s coach after failure to qualify for 2026 World Cup
title: Gattuso out as Italy’s coach after failure to qualify for 2026 World Cup
content: The Azzurri's failure to reach a third consecutive World Cup continues to send shockwaves through Italian football.

originalTitle: How the US and Israel are waging war on Iran’s medicines, vaccines
title: How the US and Israel are waging war on Iran’s medicines, vaccines
content: The Pasteur Institute of Iran is one of several healthcare facilities in the country to be targeted.

originalTitle: Real Madrid coach insists Spain ‘not racist’ despite Islamophobic chant
title: Real Madrid coach insists Spain ‘not racist’ despite Islamophobic chant
content: Barcelona forward Lamine Yamal speaks out against Islamophobic chants during Spain's match with Egypt.

originalTitle: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
title: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
content: Six weapons experts have contested the US claim that video evidence suggests an Iranian missile could have hit the hall.

originalTitle: Artemis II leaves Earth's orbit on track for far side of the Moon
title: Artemis II leaves Earth's orbit on track for far side of the Moon
content: The mission's last, big push on its lunar journey takes humans out of the Earth's orbit for the first time since 1972.

originalTitle: France's Muslim gathering ban overturned by courts
title: France's Muslim gathering ban overturned by courts
content: The Paris police department had argued that the four-day gathering was a security threat because it could be a target of terrorism.

originalTitle: Chelsea's Fernandez dropped after 'crossing a line'
title: Chelsea's Fernandez dropped after 'crossing a line'
content: Chelsea's Enzo Fernandez will sit out their next two games after he "crossed a line", says manager Liam Rosenior.

title: Arteta defends Arsenal's international withdrawals
content: Mikel Arteta says Arsenal have '"a very good relationship" with most national teams, despite 11 of his players withdrawing from international duty.

originalTitle: O'Neill wary of dropped points as games run out for Celtic
title: O'Neill wary of dropped points as games run out for Celtic
content: Martin O'Neill says further dropped points by Celtic would make winning the Scottish Premiership "a difficult comeback" but "not impossible".
